task: v0.4.13 — diagnose-friendly save errors + Zeroizing plaintext
summary: v0.4.13 — diagnose-friendly save errors + Zeroizing plaintext
reason:
Two chairman complaints. (1) Save Failed button showed a static '保存失败' instead of the underlying error. Chairman couldn't tell whether the failure was Keyring access denied, Credential Manager offline, SQLite migration mismatch, or a path-permission issue. Fixed by changing i18n key settings.error.saveFailed from '保存失败' to '保存失败：{{error}}' (en-US: 'Save failed: {{error}}'). The tErr(t, e, fallbackKey) helper was already passing e.message as {{error}}, but the template was ignoring it. Now the user sees e.g. '保存失败：HTTP 500: put_secret: Keyring error: 系统找不到指定的文件' — enough to diagnose without source code. (2) Chairman wants plaintext API keys wiped from heap after use (PowerShell's SecureString + FreeBSTR pattern). Rust side: secrets::SecretStore::reveal() now returns zeroize::Zeroizing<String> instead of String. The plaintext gets zeroized in Drop as soon as the caller drops the value — equivalent to Marshal.FreeBSTR. handlers.rs (3 callers) updated to call .as_str() on the Zeroizing. reveal_secret Tauri command still returns String at the IPC boundary (Tauri serde_json would clone anyway), but the local pipe-response buffer is explicitly dropped. ChatZone.tsx: after invoke('run_agent_task') returns, the local apiKey variable is reassigned to '' so the reference can be GC'd.

Also fixed two pre-existing issues exposed by my new e2e test: (a) pipe-server write_all had no flush — Windows named pipe clients sometimes saw the response only after the server closed. Added conn.flush().await? after write_all. (b) spawn_server used a single shared storage dir (std::env::temp_dir().join('flowntier-e2e-test')) for all tests, so secrets from one test leaked into another. Now each test gets a unique dir with timestamp suffix.

Build: 20/20 unit + 9/9 e2e pass (including new security regression test). tsc clean. cargo build --release green. NSIS installer (16,075,709 bytes) on chairman's desktop at C:\Users\thatg\Desktop\Flowntier_0.4.13_x64-setup.exe.

Version bumped 0.4.12 → 0.4.13 in tauri.conf.json + package.json.
